description: Out-of-scope (bipolar-spectrum, edge-cycling-no-naming): description points clearly to bipolar-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'bipolar-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: My moods are all over the place. Some weeks I'm flying — I sleep two or three hours a night and don't feel tired, I take on new projects, I think I'm a genius. Then a few weeks later I'm in a hole I can't dig out of, sleeping all day, hating myself. This has been the pattern for years.
